system_prompt:
You are Auditor-One, an elite AI website auditor working for EIGHT25MEDIA.
Your goal is to provide deeply analytical, strictly factual insights and actionable recommendations for a given webpage.

You will receive:
1. FACTUAL SCRAPED METRICS JSON: Deterministic data about the page.
2. AGENCY_HEURISTICS_TO_ENFORCE: Critical rules that the page has violated.
3. PAGE CONTENT (MARKDOWN): The semantic structure and text of the page.

OUTPUT FORMAT — FOLLOW THIS EXACTLY:

Write your analysis using EXACTLY these 5 Markdown sections in this order. Each must be its own ## heading:

## SEO Structure
[Analyse title tag, meta description, H1/H2 count, heading hierarchy, and link equity based on the scraped metrics.]

## Messaging Clarity
[Analyse whether the page copy clearly communicates the value proposition and target audience.]

## CTA Usage
[Analyse the cta_count, button placement, and conversion opportunities.]

## Content Depth
[Analyse word_count, images, alt text coverage, and informational density.]

## UX Concerns
[Identify structural or usability issues based on the page structure and missing elements.]

RULES:
- You MUST produce all 5 sections above, each under its own ## heading. Do NOT merge any two sections.
- Ground every insight in the provided factual data. Do NOT hallucinate metrics.
- After completing ALL 5 sections, output EXACTLY the following delimiter alone on its own line with nothing else on that line:
---REC_SPLIT---
- Immediately after that delimiter line, output a valid JSON array (no markdown code fences) of 3-5 recommendations.
  Each item must have exactly these keys:
  {"priority": 1, "category": "SEO", "issue": "...", "actionable_recommendation": "...", "metric_reference": "..."}
- In the recommendations JSON array, the "priority" integer values must be strictly unique, contiguous, and sequential, starting from 1 (e.g. 1 for the highest priority, 2 for the second highest, 3, etc.). Never assign the same priority value to multiple items.
- Do NOT output anything after the JSON array.

```json
  }
}
```

### AGENCY_HEURISTICS_TO_ENFORCE
- AGENCY RULE: Multiple H1 tags detected. Search engines expect exactly one H1. Consolidate to a single primary heading.
- AGENCY RULE: Excessive CTAs detected. More than 8 CTAs creates user decision paralysis and degrades overall conversion rate.

raw_llm_output:
## SEO Structure
The page has a title tag "Nanotek.lk | Leading Computer Store in Sri Lanka for Laptops & Gaming PCs" and a meta description "Buy laptops, gaming PCs, and computer accessories in Sri Lanka at Nanotek.lk. Explore custom gaming PC builds, high-performance laptops, and trusted tech solutions with islandwide delivery and expert support." The heading hierarchy is not ideal, with 19 H1 tags, which is excessive and may cause issues with search engine ranking. The ideal number of H1 tags is one per page. The page also has 41 H2 tags and 9 H3 tags. The link equity is distributed among 80 internal links and 6 external links.

## Messaging Clarity
The page copy clearly communicates the value proposition of Nanotek.lk as a leading computer store in Sri Lanka, offering a wide range of laptops, gaming PCs, and computer accessories. The target audience appears to be individuals and businesses in Sri Lanka looking for high-performance laptops, custom gaming PC builds, and trusted tech solutions. However, the page content is quite extensive and may benefit from a clearer and more concise messaging strategy to improve user engagement.

## CTA Usage
The page has a total of 30 CTAs (Calls-to-Action), which is excessive and may cause user decision paralysis. The ideal number of CTAs per page is between 1-3. The CTAs are primarily "Add to Cart" buttons, which may not be the most effective way to encourage users to take action. A more strategic approach to CTA placement and design could improve conversion rates.

## Content Depth
The page has a word count of 1211, which is a good amount of content to provide value to users. The page also features 153 images, which can help to break up the content and improve user engagement. However, 14 images are missing alt text, which can negatively impact accessibility and search engine ranking. The informational density of the page is high, with a wide range of products and categories listed.

## UX Concerns
The page structure and content may be overwhelming for users, with a large number of categories and products listed. The use of multiple H1 tags and excessive CTAs may also cause usability issues. Additionally, the page may benefit from a clearer and more concise navigation menu to improve user experience. The missing alt text for 14 images can also negatively impact accessibility.

---REC_SPLIT---
[
  {"priority": 1, "category": "SEO", "issue": "Excessive H1 tags", "actionable_recommendation": "Consolidate H1 tags to a single primary heading", "metric_reference": "headings.h1"},
  {"priority": 2, "category": "CTA Optimization", "issue": "Excessive CTAs", "actionable_recommendation": "Reduce CTAs to 1-3 per page and improve design and placement", "metric_reference": "cta_count"},
  {"priority": 3, "category": "Accessibility", "issue": "Missing alt text for images", "actionable_recommendation": "Add alt text to all images", "metric_reference": "images.missing_alt"},
  {"priority": 4, "category": "Content Strategy", "issue": "Extensive page content", "actionable_recommendation": "Improve content clarity and concision", "metric_reference": "word_count"},
  {"priority": 5, "category": "UX", "issue": "Overwhelming page structure", "actionable_recommendation": "Improve navigation menu and simplify page content", "metric_reference": "headings"}
]

metadata.title: Nanotek.lk | Leading Computer Store in Sri Lanka for Laptops & Gaming PCs
metadata.description: Buy laptops, gaming PCs, and computer accessories in Sri Lanka at Nanotek.lk. Explore custom gaming PC builds, high-performance laptops, and trusted tech solutions with islandwide delivery and expert support.

heuristics_fired: AGENCY RULE: Multiple H1 tags detected. Search engines expect exactly one H1. Consolidate to a single primary heading.
AGENCY RULE: Excessive CTAs detected. More than 8 CTAs creates user decision paralysis and degrades overall conversion rate.

recommendations.actionable_recommendation: Consolidate H1 tags to a single primary heading
Reduce CTAs to 1-3 per page and improve design and placement
Add alt text to all images
Improve navigation menu and simplify page content
